name: TaskAuthorPolicy
description: Authorization rules for Task entities. The user who filed a task (creator) can edit, close, and delete their own task but cannot approve or reject it. Users assigned to a task (assignees) and task reviewers can resolve (approve/reject) the task and add comments. Owners of the entity the task is about have full control over the task including reassignment.

rules.name: TaskAuthorPolicy-FilerCannotResolveOwnTask
rules.description: Deny task filers from resolving (approving/rejecting/granting/revoking) their own task.

rules.name: TaskAuthorPolicy-FilerEditCloseDeleteOwnTask
rules.description: Allow task filers to edit, close, and delete their own task.

rules.name: TaskAuthorPolicy-ApproverResolveTask
rules.description: Allow task assignees and reviewers to resolve (approve/reject), comment on, and close the task.
